issues.evidence: The brief says the clean-mist filter component is obtained in chapter 2 and full activation is reserved for chapter 3. The draft refines this into core filter part obtained and pressure sealing ring still missing.
issues.suggested_fix: Either accept this as a tactical refinement that preserves the chapter 3 activation hook, or revise to say the full component is obtained but not installed.

issues.evidence: Characters canon allows Lin Zhixia to be an emergency doctor or nurse. The draft specifies emergency nurse.
issues.suggested_fix: Confirm emergency nurse as the locked role, or revise to keep the profession broader until later.

proposed_state_updates: Lin Zhixia formally appears at the first service area and demonstrates triage and pollution-suspicion judgment.
Lu Chenzhou retrieves the clean-mist filter core part from C-zone fuel point.
The RV system shows component status and continued safe-air countdown.
Lu Chenzhou publicly states the first boarding rule: boarding is not rescue, it is a contract.
human_approval_needed: Approve clean-mist filter component split into core filter part plus pressure sealing ring.
Approve Lin Zhixia as an emergency nurse rather than leaving doctor/nurse ambiguous.
